text: Here's what science actually says about placebo control. Placebo controls aren't just tricks; they're essential for testing new treatments. In clinical trials, they tell us if a drug works better than a sugar pill. Studies show up to 30% of patients can experience real relief with placebos. But why does this happen? The brain responds to belief, influencing our health. Yet, it's not fully understood. Ongoing research is uncovering more. Want to dive deeper into the science of the mind? Like and follow for more!
